# Copilot instructions — start at AGENTS.md

This repository is an AI-assisted **meta-kit** template.

- Read `AGENTS.md` first
- Follow `docs/cleanliness-and-organization.md`
- Prefer `services/` + `apps/` for microservices
- English only in repository files
- Do not skip git hooks; `scripts/validate.sh` mirrors CI
- Releases use release-please — do not hand-bump versions in normal flow
